titles.title: I Know My Name Is There

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My name is in the Book of Life, Oh bless the Name of Jesus I rise above all doubt and strife And read my title clear.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I know, I know, My name is there I know, I know, I truly know My name is written there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With sinners lost once my name stood, Upon a painful record, But now it's cancelled by the Blood And written on His roll.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yet inward trouble often cast A shadow o’er my title But now with full salvation blest Praise God its ever clear.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: While others climb through worldly strife To carve a Name of Honour High up in heavens Book of Life My name is written there.
